channel.title: Download free software, update daily!
channel.description: Taiwebs.com - Download free software applications, full version, latest updates!

item.title: Download WiFi Direct + 10.0.44
item.description: Wi-Fi Direct is a Wi-Fi standard for peer-to-peer wireless connections that allows two devices to establish a direct Wi-Fi connection without the need for an intermediate wireless access point, router, or Internet connection. Features of WiFi Direct + Fast Completely free, no intrusive ads. Supports all file transfers. Supports multiple file transfers. Supports folder transfer. Supports file transfer to and from external sdcard. Tested on many devices. Advanced file chooser.

item.title: Download Duolingo: language lessons 6.69.3
item.description: Duolingo is a popular language learning app that offers interactive lessons to help users learn new languages. This application offers many languages for you to choose from, including Spanish, French, German, Italian, Portuguese, Chinese, Japanese and many more. This app offers an gamified learning experience with interactive lessons, exercises, and quizzes designed to help users learn new words, phrases, and grammar rules. This app is designed to be easy to use and suitable for people...

It provides video resolution in multiple formats 144p, 720p, 1080p HD, 2K HD, 4K HD and audio formats MP3 and M4A. With Snaptube, users can search for content across all their platforms without using multiple apps. item.title: Download MyFitnessPal: Calorie Counter 26.9.1
item.description: MyFitnessPal is a mobile app and website that allows users to track their daily food intake, workouts, and weight loss progress. The app includes a calorie counter that allows users to easily log and track their daily calorie intake. Our members have lost more than 200 million pounds, and 88% of those who followed for at least 7 days on MyFitnessPal lost weight. item.title: Download CodeMatics Universal TV Remote Control 3.0.6
item.description: For Smart TV/Devices, the only setting required is to connect your phone as well as your Smart TV/Device to the same Wifi network. For IR TVs, your phone must have a built-in Infrared (IR) feature for the app to work as a remote control. The IR feature is required to send signals from the phone to the TV like a regular TV remote. You can now Cast media files stored on your mobile phone to your Smart TV screen.
